assertions.name: tests-pass
assertions.outputSample:
> node-multi-tenant@1.0.8 test
> npm run build && nyc --reporter=text mocha "tests/**/*.test.js" --exit


> node-multi-tenant@1.0.8 build
> tsc -p tsconfig.json



  TenancyCli
    ✓ dispatches seed and migration commands without touching the database directly

  ConfigLoader
    ✓ returns an explicit config without reading from disk
    ✓ uses the built-in test config when NODE_ENV is test
    ✓ loads tenants/tenancy.ts as the default project config
    ✓ excludes shared models and index.js from tenant model discovery

  buildConnectionString
    ✓ builds a Sequelize URL from the current database config
    ✓ can override the database name for tenant-specific connections

  TenantContextRegistry
    ✓ remembers, resolves, and forgets hostnames case-insensitively
    ✓ throws when a tenant context has not been initialized
    ✓ resolves uncached hostnames through the default database and caches them
    ✓ returns undefined when hostname lookup has no rows
    ✓ closes and removes existing contexts and ignores missing contexts
    ✓ initializes default and tenant contexts from configured models

  public package exports
    ✓ exposes the package facade from build/main.js
    ✓ keeps delete as the CommonJS alias for deleteRecord
    ✓ delegates public facade calls to a configured TenantService instance

  TenantRepository
    ✓ creates a single entity through the active tenant model
    ✓ uses bulkCreate when adding an array of entities
    ✓ finds records with and without filters
    ✓ wraps model failures in RepositoryError
    ✓ writes audit records for tenant mutations when enabled
    ✓ does not audit mutations on the default tenant
    ✓ removes records and audits the previous value
    ✓ truncates records and writes one audit row per removed record
    ✓ updates records and returns the model update result
    ✓ finds by primary key and unwraps dataValues
    ✓ finds one record and unwraps dataValues
    ✓ executes raw SQL against the active tenant context

  TenantService
    ✓ initializes once and wires requestUrl events to tenant resolution
    ✓ honors the configured default hostname and cached tenant hostnames
    ✓ creates a tenant, provisions its database, and caches the hostname
    ✓ deletes a tenant and restores default tenant context
    ✓ updates tenant fields without changing protected identity fields
    ✓ delegates data operations to the repository after initialization
    ✓ starts the interactive CLI when requested


  40 passing (439ms)
